title: The glove of Thanos
description: Thanos glove with 6 infinity stones.Thanos glove with 6 infinity stones.
body:
Thanos' gauntlet from the movie Avengers Infinity War.
The gauntlet gives the powers of each stone.
1. Power Stone - gives a level 5 power effect.
2. Space Stone - can teleport you to any dimension: upper world Nether and End.
3. Reality Stone - with its help you can switch between creative and survival game modes.
4. Soul Stone - gives you the power of the soul with the help of which you become immortal for a while.
5. Time Stone with which you can stop time while in the menu Infinity Glove.
6. Mind Stone gives you moral support in battle :)
